{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032015514747B3553E7A9C0730C1D6\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7577250316620890905","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉还是差点东西"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764218692,"group_id":"7529561662144138265","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"深夜的太阳，虽然微弱，但他是孤独者的希望。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxOG7u6CwPaTz+DovavY0lp7zulj4/xANWWGDDq6rKyy","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d341095272e449b190ff502aa53f38f8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776530379\u0026x-signature=Th4DSndv0UgIUWgfdylk55XB0ds%3D","user_id":"3435337625124366","user_name":"夜独烛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3435337625124366","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{\"title_name\":\"作家Lv.1\",\"title_id\":\"author_level_1\"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{\"title_text\":\"作家Lv.1\",\"title_default_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"title_dark_color\":\"#FFFFFF\",\"bg_default_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#FF9F31\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#FFB95C\\\"}\",\"bg_dark_color\":\"{\\\"start\\\":\\\"#CC8029\\\",\\\"end\\\":\\\"#CC9349\\\"}\",\"title_dark_diaphaneity\":\"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7529561662144138265","book_info":{"abstract":"在由三大家族掌控的青阳城，楚家天才楚星河一朝陨落沦为“废物”，不仅族比前遭下毒暗算，还面临大长老逼迫交出《玄天剑诀》。危急之际，父亲留下的玉佩引出上古至宝玄天珠，内藏玄天老祖残魂，揭示楚家血脉真相并授予主角独特修炼功法《九转玄天功》。楚星河凭借玄天珠内时间差闭关修炼，强势回归族比，连败对手，揭露并废掉修炼魔功的楚云飞。对决青梅竹马楚雨薇时，他发现对方知晓自己修为倒退真相，而大长老的出手干预，又被玄天宗执法长老及时阻止。故事围绕楚星河的逆袭成长展开，伏笔重重，不仅有血脉秘密待揭，还有禁地玄天剑冢隐藏的剑诀谜团以及与玄天宗的神秘渊源，引人入胜，带您一同走进这精彩的修真世界。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o3233081aa6054057228ad5b6e1a8f141~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"夜独烛","author_id":"","book_id":"7529561662144138265","book_name":"荒域圣尊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#404860","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1140,\"name\":\"东方仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140\u0026name=东方仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":90,\"name\":\"天才\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90\u0026name=天才\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":80,\"name\":\"剑道\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=80\u0026name=剑道\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":259,\"name\":\"奇幻仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259\u0026name=奇幻仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7529678825278407193","read_count":"0","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"355238"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"122","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,奇幻仙侠,剑道,天才","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o3233081aa6054057228ad5b6e1a8f141~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779177107\u0026x-signature=JpvYJztwADaF5y5aEx8qKznJHhg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3435337625124366","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"44"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032015514747B3553E7A9C0730C1D6\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7529561662144138265","book_name":"","book_type":"","color_dominate":"","creation_status":"","genre":"","genre_type":"","score":"","serial_count":"","tags":"","thumb_url":"","tomato_book_status":""},"filter_tag":[],"hot_word_search":[],"score_cnt":1,"score_text":"1人点评"}},"debug_info":"","log_id":"2026032015514747B3553E7A9C0730C1D6","message":"请求成功"}
